title: MikroTik GPER14i, PoE extender
description: The Mikrotik GPER14i is a manageable outdoor PoE extender, perfect for extending power to your outdoor devices such as Wi-Fi access points and IP cameras. It features 4x Gigabit LAN ports, with 1 port supporting PoE-IN (802.3bt, 90W) and the remaining 3 ports providing PoE-OUT (802.3af/at, max. 30W/port). Ports 2-4 are isolated from each other and communicate only with the first port. The extender is built with a durable design and IP68 rating, solid protection from water, dust, dirt and sand,… 4x Gigabit LAN - 1x PoE-IN 802.3bt (90W) and 3x PoE-OUT 802.3af/at (30W/port) 2-pin terminal block - option for redundant power supply IP68 rating - rugged design SwOS Lite - monitoring, VLAN, SNMP, QoS Device Hose clamp
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 48 .. 56V DC The input voltage [V] 24 .. 57V DC Output Power / 1port [W] 30 PoE Input ports 1 PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 3 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 76 Height [mm] 281 Depth [mm] 70
